description_long: This is a small, rectangular packet of Dr. Oetker Suiker met vanillesmaak, a vanilla-flavored sugar product. The front of the packet features a yellow and orange gradient background with the Dr. Oetker logo at the top, followed by bold red and white text. Below the text, there is an image of a dollop of whipped cream and a vanilla cookie, visually indicating the flavor and use of the product. The packet appears to be made of a flexible, glossy plastic material, typical for single-use food sachets. The sides of the packet are very thin, showing the flatness of the packaging. The overall design is clean and visually appealing, with clear branding and product imagery.
description: A small, flat, glossy yellow-orange packet of Dr. Oetker vanilla-flavored sugar with clear branding and product imagery on the front.
description_view_0: Front view showing the Dr. Oetker logo, product name, and images of whipped cream and a cookie.
description_view_1: Side view revealing the thin, flat profile of the packet with minimal visible detail.
description_view_2: Rear/front view identical to the front, again displaying the branding and product imagery.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, again showing the thinness and flatness of the packet.
attribute_brand_logo: The Dr. Oetker logo is visible at the top front of the packet, featuring a blue and red oval with a white silhouette and text.
attribute_flavor_indication: The text 'met vanillesmaak' and the image of whipped cream and a cookie indicate a vanilla flavor.
